notes: Implemented a thin React approval screen that calls POST /api/marketing/jobs/:jobId/approve via createMarketingClient.approveJob(jobId, body).
Approval request body is strictly PostMarketingJobApproveRequest contract fields: tenantId, approvedBy, approvedStages, resumePublishIfNeeded.
Approval stages are constrained to contract-defined MarketingStage values only: research, strategy, production, publish.
UI now clearly shows approval success/failure message and still renders raw status/approval JSON for visibility.
